title: kpod stop -a
body:
Stop all running containers with single switch.  Useful for
maintainence of a system or integration tests.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: A question and stop.go needs some gofmt love.
We don't mention paused containers anywhere in the man page. We could probably just add "running" to the description and not have to mention other states.
@baude Make a small change to the man page and then we can get this merged.
it already said running containers ... did you want a change on top of that?
FWIW, I think it's good to go now, assuming happy tests.
